title: astragalus kiviensis
intro: Astragalus kiviensis, also known as the Kivi astragalus or Kivi milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus kiviensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Astragalus kiviensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support overall health and well-being.
